hero.name: devcy0922
hero.headline: An engineer building an AI product from end-to-end
hero.tagline: I develop and operate GoVail, an enterprise platform that unifies authentication, DLP policies, real-time routing, and audit logs at the edge of AI requests.
hero.context: An Enterprise AI governance platform composed of 5 microservices in Rust and Python, 90+ tests, and 8 workflows.
home.stats.label: Career & Project Summary
home.experience.label: Experience
home.experience.title: Experience connecting and operating enterprise systems
home.experience.desc: My pre-AI experience is not background context; it is the foundation of this portfolio. I lead with the responsibilities I have owned from development through delivery and operations.
home.experience.backend.title: Enterprise Backend
home.experience.backend.desc: Designed and operated B2B and SaaS backends, legacy modernization, and external API and data integrations.
home.experience.identity.title: Identity, Access & Data
home.experience.identity.desc: Worked with SSO, role-based access, key management, RDB, Redis, and traceable audit events.
home.experience.operations.title: Delivery & Service Reliability
home.experience.operations.desc: Standardized Docker and CI/CD while operating cloud services with deployment, incident tracing, and high availability in mind.
home.projects.label: Featured Projects
home.projects.title: Selected work that turns experience into implementation
home.projects.desc: Three projects solving different problems across AI platforms, automation pipelines, and developer tooling—not three modules from one product family.
home.demo.label: Working Demo
home.demo.title: See how AI request boundaries work in practice
home.demo.desc: The Runtime Demo shows how public requests pass authentication and policy checks, reach a private LLM, and generate audit events.
home.demo.audit: Record the Response and Audit Events
home.evidence.label: Verifiable Evidence
home.evidence.title: Claims are supported by code, design decisions, and runtime results.
home.evidence.desc: Each project separates the problem, implementation scope, key decisions, and current limitations. Public code is linked where available, and selected runtime behavior can be verified in a constrained demo.
home.evidence.repository: Review the code and change history of projects that can be published.
home.evidence.decisions: Read the problem, chosen structure, trade-offs, and limitations together.
home.evidence.runtime: Validate the representative AI platform case through real requests and policy blocks.
path.caption: From Request Ingestion to Operations Audit
path.boundary: Each step re-validates credentials and tenant scope, ensuring operational secrets and internal Model IDs are never exposed on public screens.
capability.boundary.title: Multi-Tenant Request Boundaries
capability.boundary.desc: Enforces authentication, authorization, quotas, and data scope per request.
capability.delivery.title: Verifiable Delivery Pipeline
capability.delivery.desc: Controls change risk through IaC, security regression testing, and deployment automation.
capability.runtime.title: Observable AI Runtime
capability.runtime.desc: Connects routing, inference, and audit events into a single operational flow.
career.title: Connecting Long-Standing Operations Challenges to AI Request Boundaries.
career.desc: I treat AI projects not as isolated trends, but as an evolution of enterprise systems. I redesign recurring authentication, deployment, audit, and integration challenges for the generative AI era.
career.identity.title: Authentication & Authorization
career.identity.desc: Extends enterprise SSO and authorization experience to project principals, model policies, and tool permissions.
career.delivery.title: Deployment & Execution Standardization
career.delivery.desc: Applies CI/CD, Docker, and AWS operations experience to reproducible AI service deployment and security regression validation.
career.operations.title: Audit & Legacy Integration
career.operations.desc: Transforms audit response, key management, and external API/data integration experience into traceable request flows and isolation boundaries.
career.destination: Policy, Isolation & Audit Boundaries of the GoVail AI Platform
section.selectedSystems.desc: Positioning GoVail as the core system, Aegis-LLM, Aperture MCP, and SliceRAG are distinguished as key components. The AgentSecOps Playground validates these boundaries together.
system.platform.label: Core System · PLATFORM
system.core.label: Verifiable Core Components
system.validation.label: Integrated Validation
lab.intro.title: Showcasing Execution Paths Before Explanations.
lab.intro.desc: In the Live Lab below, click runtime nodes to inspect contract and failure boundaries, and observe how actual private LLM requests flow from policy checks to response auditing.
lab.intro.evidence: View E2E evidence for security invariants and failover
project.govail.title: GoVail Gateway
project.govail.desc: A representative AI platform case that separates authentication, policy, routing, and audit into a single request boundary.
project.aegis.title: Aegis-LLM
project.aegis.desc: A Rust control plane for LLM request authentication, DLP, prompt security, and fallback handling.
project.slicerag.title: SliceRAG
project.slicerag.desc: A RAG Data Plane that stores and retrieves documents strictly within project_id scopes.
project.agentsecops.title: AgentSecOps
project.agentsecops.desc: An E2E Harness validating security failure paths across the Gateway, RAG, and Mock LLM.
project.aperture.title: Aperture-MCP
project.aperture.desc: A Rust Policy Proxy that inspects and blocks MCP tools/calls before execution.
project.lingo.title: LingoAgent
project.lingo.desc: An i18n pipeline that connects translation, ICU validation, LLM QA, and automated commits to block unverified output from deployment.
project.leandraft.title: Leandraft Linter
project.leandraft.desc: A Rust-based Markdown static analyzer that checks technical document structure and sensitive-data exposure before commit.
lingo.banner.title: Translated by LingoAgent
lingo.banner.desc: The UI text on this page was automatically generated via the LingoAgent pipeline (ICU validation + LLM QA) using ko.json as the source.
